query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM properties WHERE companyId = 'comp_baggio_001') as total_properties,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE companyId = 'comp_baggio_001') as total_sales,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commissions WHERE companyId = 'comp_baggio_001') as total_commissions;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3eAQdaRY4zkjYsC.95a35ec57269 --database FWQUTMFHrecTsndnoBiUKo --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM properties WHERE companyId = 'comp_baggio_001') as total_properties,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE companyId = 'comp_baggio_001') as total_sales,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commissions WHERE companyId = 'comp_baggio_001') as total_commissions;
